name: stm32f407vet6_golden
description: STM32F407VET6 custom board Golden Test Suite — 15 tests via ESP32JTAG (SWD over WiFi). MCU: STM32F407VET6 (512 KB Flash, NOT 1 MB VGT6). Stage0: timer mailbox. Stage1: GPIO/UART/SPI. Stage2: ADC temp, EXTI, ADC loopback. Stage3: I2C, PWM capture, DMA M2M, CRC, RNG, DAC→ADC, FPU, RTC. IWDG excluded.

deferred.reason: EXCLUDED from suite: after IWDG test completes, board enters continuous IWDG-reset loop (IWDGRSTF set on every boot, firmware re-enters Phase2, never kicks IWDG, resets again). This breaks SWD and prevents re-flashing without BOOT0 recovery. Test plan and firmware preserved but must not be run in automated suites.
Requires LA frequency verification; TIM2_CLK observed at 42 MHz (half expected 84 MHz) — PLL clock discrepancy under investigation
DMA TEIF error — root cause unresolved
